name: Thung Wars
author: Poki
description: Thung Wars is a tower battle game where your favorite brainrot characters clash in all-out chaos! Command an army featuring icons like Tung Tung Tung Sahur, Tralalero Tralala, and Ballerina Cappuccina as you defend your base and launch hilarious attacks against your enemies. Strategize, upgrade, and unleash ultimate brainrot power to dominate the battlefield! Join the madness and lead your brainrot army to victory! How to play Thung Wars? Click or tap to make the choice. Who created Thung Wars? Thung Wars is created by Peynir Games. Play their other games on Poki: Car Parking School ! How can I play Thung Wars for free? You can play Thung Wars for free on Poki. Can I play Thung Wars on mobile devices and desktop? Thung Wars can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
